name: token_sampling_v1
description: Deterministic token sampling pipeline for adapterOS inference. Covers temperature scaling, top-K filtering, top-P nucleus sampling, combined multi-stage pipelines, and the HKDF-seeded ChaCha20Rng determinism guarantee. 2000 examples with worked numerical computations and codebase-accurate implementation details.

entries.notes: 2000 token sampling examples across five subcategories: temperature effects (400), top-K filtering (400), top-P nucleus (400), combined strategies (400), determinism guarantee (400)

provenance.review_notes: Synthetic dataset with realistic logit distributions and worked softmax/filtering computations. All numerical examples derived from first principles matching the adapterOS generation.rs implementation. Pipeline order matches codebase: logits -> temperature -> softmax -> top-K -> top-P -> ChaCha20Rng sample.

evaluation_gates: Temperature tau=0 selects argmax without RNG draw (SamplingStrategy::Greedy)
Temperature scaling divides logits by tau before softmax, clamped to max(0.01)
Top-K filtering zeroes probabilities outside top K and renormalizes
Top-P nucleus keeps smallest token set with cumulative probability >= P
Pipeline order is temperature -> softmax -> top-K -> top-P -> sample
Per-step RNG re-seeding via derive_step_seed(step) using HKDF
Same seed + same logits + same params = same token (determinism invariant)
Q15 quantization uses denominator 32767 (not 32768) with i16::MIN sentinel for None
Receipt binds temperature_q15, top_p_q15, and seed digest for auditable determinism
Repetition penalty divides logit by penalty^count before temperature scaling
intent: Train the adapter to reason about the complete adapterOS deterministic token sampling pipeline: how temperature reshapes logit distributions, how top-K and top-P filter candidate tokens, how the pipeline stages compose in sequence, and how HKDF-seeded ChaCha20Rng guarantees reproducible generation across replays. The dataset emphasizes numerical precision, codebase-accurate implementation details, and the relationship between sampling parameters and the receipt-based determinism audit system.

temperature_effects.description: Temperature scaling effects on softmax distribution: greedy/argmax at tau=0, sharpening at tau<1, identity at tau=1, flattening at tau>1

topk_filtering.description: Top-K filtering: zero out probabilities outside top K tokens and renormalize. Shows filtering mechanics, probability redistribution, and interaction with vocabulary size

topp_nucleus.description: Top-P nucleus sampling: keep smallest set of tokens with cumulative probability >= P. Shows distribution-adaptive filtering, nucleus size computation, and renormalization

combined_strategies.description: Full pipeline walkthroughs combining temperature, top-K, top-P, and repetition penalty. Shows vocabulary funnel, stage interactions, and parameter composition

determinism_guarantee.description: HKDF seed chain, replay determinism proofs, violation diagnosis, platform float sensitivity, and receipt Q15 binding for auditable determinism
